provider.description: AI provider id (e.g., `anthropic`, `openai`, `gemini`, `bedrock`, `vertex`). MUST be in `Capabilities.aiProviders.supported` for the run to dispatch.

model.description: Provider-specific model id. The pack does NOT validate this — the host's aiProviders surface returns `model_not_supported` if the host can't route.

systemPrompt.description: Optional system prompt. Hosts that route to providers without first-class system roles MAY merge into the first message.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Provider-specific upper bound: typically 1 for OpenAI, 2 for some others. Hosts MAY clamp.

maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens to generate. Hosts MAY enforce a lower per-tenant cap.

stopSequences.description: Optional stop sequences. Provider-specific limit (Anthropic: 4, OpenAI: 4); hosts MAY truncate.
